events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk. The dial indicator reading (~0.008 in / 0.20 mm) exceeds the ~0.002 in (0.05 mm) soft foot tolerance referenced in API 686, and since the soft foot was left uncorrected before laser alignment, any resulting alignment readings are invalid — torquing bolts on a distorted base shifts shaft position each time. Corrective action requires shimming to correct soft foot, re-torquing, and re-shooting the alignment before the work can be accepted.
